t_ch: 塞涅俄丝的后裔——就是你么，小女孩？
t_en: Little girl... Are you Seliose's descendant?

t_ch: 是我，索拉比斯阁下。我的名字是雅辛忒丝，伙伴们都叫我风堇。
t_en: It is me, Lord Solabis. My name is Hyacinthia, and my companions call me Hyacine.

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝——你身上没有她的气息。
t_en: Hyacinthia — you don't have the scent of her on you.

t_ch: 千年过去，英雄塞涅俄丝的血脉恐怕已经无比纤薄。但天空一族的决心从未被岁月冲蚀，我此行正是为了完成她的遗愿。
t_en: It's been a thousand years. Seliose's blood may have thinned in my veins, but the resolve of the Sky people has never been eroded by time. I've journeyed here to fulfill her dying wish.

t_ch: 她的遗愿，你了解多少？
t_en: How much do you know about her dying wish?

t_ch: 我知道…她为了支撑破碎的天空，与泰坦的神躯融为了一体。
t_en: I know that... in order to support the shattered sky, she merged herself with the divine body of the Titan.

t_ch: 我也知道，她留下了谏言，令后人有朝一日重返天顶，取走艾格勒的火种。
t_en: And I also know that she left behind a message, calling on future generations to one day ascend to the heavens again and reclaim the Coreflame of Aquila.

t_ch: …自从坠入大地，传说已变成了这般样貌吗？
t_en: ...Has the legend changed so much since your people fell to the earth?

t_ch: 女孩，你说自己是名医师？
t_en: Girl, you said you're a doctor?

t_ch: 只懂疗愈和扶伤…如此柔弱的命格，打算凭借什么挑战天空的化身？
t_en: You only know how to heal and tend to wounds... With such a weak lot in life, how do you plan to challenge the embodiment of the heavens?

t_ch: 凭这柄长剑，英魂。
t_en: With this long sword, heroic soul.

t_ch: 还有这根棍子！
t_en: And my bat!

t_ch: 还有他的长枪！
t_en: And his spear!

t_ch: 还有它的…粉色爱心！
t_en: And their... pink love!

t_ch: 如你所见，我们都是雅辛忒丝的伙伴，她的战友。
t_en: As you can see, we are all Hyacinthia's companions and comrades.

t_ch: 而我们具备的力量，你刚才已经见识过了。
t_en: You've already witnessed our combined strength.

t_ch: …不赖，但比起她还相去甚远。
t_en: ...It's not bad, but still lacking compared to her.

t_ch: 索拉比斯，放下你的孤傲，接受他们的善意吧。
t_en: Solabis, let go of your ego and accept their kindness.

t_ch: 你被黑潮所困的岁月里，世界发生了剧变。若我没猜错，战神尼卡多利也是陨落于这几位勇士之手。
t_en: You've been trapped in time by the black tide, while great change has spread over the world. If I'm not mistaken, the God of War Nikador also fell to the hands of these warriors.

t_ch: 我们已令其他泰坦一一安息。如今，逐火的终点正是这座天空堡垒的主人。
t_en: We've laid all the other Titans to rest, one by one. Now, the final target for the Flame-Chase is the master of this sky fortress.

t_ch: 请引领我们去往艾格勒面前吧，两位英魂。弑神取火的纪元由塞涅俄丝亲手开启，哪怕她无法亲眼看到一个时代的终结，至少你们能代为见证。
t_en: Please guide us to an audience with Aquila, heroic souls. Seliose initiated the era of slaying gods and attaining their flames. Even if she could not witness the end of this era, you will all at least bear witness on her behalf.

t_ch: …自信、凌厉，我倒是从你身上看见了几分她的影子。
t_en: Confidence and fierceness — Yes, I do indeed see a shadow of her in you.

t_ch: 艾格勒的印记…飞走了？
t_en: Aquila's mark... flew away?

t_ch: 它察觉到什么了？
t_en: Did they sense something?

t_ch: 泰坦…有反应了？
t_en: Is that a reaction... from the Titan?

t_ch: 或许它感应到了我们的苏醒。
t_en: Maybe they detected our awakening.

t_ch: 或许我们的气息，让它回忆起了千年前的鏖战。
t_en: Perhaps our presence stirred memories of the fierce battle from a thousand years ago.

t_ch: 从过往的记忆那里，我们得知天空的泰坦忌讳阴云。两位或许知道更多细节？
t_en: We learned from past memories that the Sky Titan fears dark clouds. Would you know more about this topic?

t_ch: 那忆灵所言为实，但你们还需向导。
t_en: What the memosprite said is true, but you all still need a guide.

t_ch: 随我来，让猎神重启吧。雅辛忒丝，还有勇士们。
t_en: Follow me, Hyacinthia and fellow warriors. Let the hunt for the gods start again.

t_ch: 千年的时光飞逝，这里的一切仿佛没有任何变化——只是少了人言的嘈杂。
t_en: A thousand years have passed, and yet this place feels the same — Just that there is no more human clamor.

t_ch: 这是晖之民的殿堂，烈阳之子们曾在此举办盛大的仪典，感恩艾格勒的馈赠。
t_en: This is the hall of the Sunfolk, where the Sunborn once held grand ceremonies to give thanks for Aquila's gifts.

t_ch: 所以…天空泰坦真的在偏袒晖之民吗？
t_en: So... Did the Sky Titan really take the side of the Sunfolk?

t_ch: 人们都是那么以为，直到塞涅俄丝的枪尖穿透了艾格勒的怒火。
t_en: Everyone thought so until Seliose's spear pierced through Aquila's wrath.

t_ch: 那时，我们才终于明白：艾格勒在躲避的并非云雨，而是蛰伏于阴影中的恐怖。
t_en: Only then did we understand that Aquila wasn't hiding from the clouds and rain, but from the horror that lurked within the unlit shadows.

t_ch: 黑潮……
t_en: The black tide...

t_ch: 那东西一直蔓延到现在。
t_en: That thing has been spreading ever since.

t_ch: 黑潮的威胁逼迫黄金裔完成逐火之旅，迈向神谕中的创世奇迹。
t_en: The black tide's threat has forced the Chrysos Heirs to complete our Flame-Chase Journey, heading toward the prophecy's Miracle of Genesis.

t_ch: 「黄金裔」…在我们的时代，那名号会掀起激愤的浪潮。但你们看上去却是受人尊崇的英雄。
t_en: "Chrysos Heirs"... In our time, that title used to stir up waves of outrage. But you all seem to be revered as heroes.

t_ch: 都是前人的功劳——缇里西庇俄丝和阿格莱雅，你应该听过这两个名字。
t_en: It's all thanks to those who came before us — Tribios and Aglaea. You must've heard of these two names.

t_ch: 哦…走到最后的，竟是她们俩啊。
t_en: Mmm... So it was those two who made it to the end.

t_ch: …什么意思？
t_en: ...What does that mean?

t_ch: 无关的话就不多谈了。你们知道该如何启动浑象仪。去吧，逼出那画壁上的泰坦。
t_en: Let's not elaborate on unrelated topics. You now know how to activate the celestial globe. So go, and force out the Titan in the mural.

t_ch: 通路…被风场装置吸走了？
t_en: The road got... sucked away by the wind fan?

t_ch: 是艾格勒做的吗？
t_en: Did Aquila do that?

t_ch: 别怕！如果有必要，就<color=#dbc291ff>施展「岁月」的神力回溯它吧。</color>
t_en: You have nothing to fear! We can <color=#dbc291ff>use the power of Time to rewind it</color> if we have to.

t_ch: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
t_en: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

t_ch: 「变幻吧，『天象画壁』。」
t_en: "Change, Celestial Mural."

t_ch: 天象转换…没能成功？
t_en: The celestial shift... didn't work?

t_ch: 岁月无情，也许是装置老化损坏了。
t_en: Perhaps the device has been damaged during these long merciless years.

t_ch: 看到殿堂两侧那些巨大的「电路」了么？也许我们该试着把它们修好。
t_en: Do you see those two giant "circuits" on either side of the hall? Maybe we should try fixing them.

t_ch: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
t_en: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

t_ch: 「变幻吧，『天象画壁』！」
t_en: "Change, Celestial Mural!"

t_ch: 印记…又消失了？
t_en: The mark... has disappeared again?

t_ch: 看来它还不想直面我们。不知是因为胆怯…还是因为它留了后手。
t_en: Looks like they're still avoiding us. I wonder if it's cowardice... or if they have something up their sleeve.

t_ch: 如今的艾格勒，恐怕早已失去理智……
t_en: I fear the Aquila of present has long lost their sanity...

t_ch: 但本能仍在驱使它远离黑暗，逃避黑潮的围堵。
t_en: But instinct still drives them to flee from the shadows, to evade the black tide's encroachment.

t_ch: 艾格勒这么谨慎吗？
t_en: Is Aquila really that cautious?

t_ch: 勿将秉性与力量混为一谈，勇者。
t_en: Do not mistake their behavior for weakness, warrior.

t_ch: 我直面过天空的暴君，它的怒火足以熔化天穹——并非夸大其词，因为翁法罗斯的苍天即是它的权柄。
t_en: I have faced down the tyrant of the sky. It is no hyperbole that their raging fire is capable of melting the firmament. Amphoreus's heavens exist because of their authority.

t_ch: 那位英雄的意识还在么？
t_en: Does that hero's consciousness still remain?

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝的处境，我无从知晓。
t_en: I have no knowledge of Seliose's situation.

t_ch: 但我能断定，主宰那印记的并非她的意识…她绝不会如逃兵般无顾尊严，在乌云的追赶下流窜。
t_en: But I am certain that the will behind that mark is not hers... She would not abscond like a disgraceful deserter, willingly exiled by the pursuit of dark clouds.

t_ch: 该离开此地了。露奈比斯在下一站等待你们。
t_en: It is time to leave this place. Lunabis awaits you at the next stop.

t_ch: 请等一下，索拉比斯阁下。我…还有一件事想做。
t_en: A moment please, Lord Solabis. I... have one more thing I wish to do.

t_ch: …什么，女孩？
t_en: ...What is it, girl?

t_ch: 为了遵守与英雄塞涅俄丝的约定，她的后裔用了一千年的时光守望天空。我想，那世世代代为同一个理想而活的先祖们，他们有权知道传说的真相。
t_en: To honor the pact with Seliose, her descendants spent a millennium looking up at the sky. I believe my countless ancestors who lived for that purpose deserve to know the truth behind her legend.

t_ch: 如果你不介意我们敲开往世的大门…能否准许我窥探一眼此处的历史？
t_en: If you don't mind us knocking on the gates of the past... Maybe I can peek into this place's history...

t_ch: 掌握欧洛尼斯神迹的是你们。我无权阻止你们翻阅那段往事。
t_en: You are the ones who hold Oronyx's miracle. I have no authority to prevent you from delving into the past.

t_ch: 迷宝，灰宝，能拜托你们吗？我想给在彼岸等待的先祖们一个交代。
t_en: Memmie, Grayie, could I please ask you for this favor? I want to show the truth to my ancestors waiting on the other side.

t_ch: 交给我们吧，这是你的权利。
t_en: Leave it to us. This is your right.

t_ch: 如果传说有虚假的成分…那它背后一定有必须被粉饰的理由。
t_en: If there are falsehoods in the legends... then there must be a reason for its embellishment.

t_ch: 假如传说是个谎言…
t_en: If the legend is a lie...

t_ch: 那它一定有必须被粉饰为谎言的理由…对吗？
t_en: Then there must be a reason behind its falsehood... right?

t_ch: 这里的景象，还有此前的记忆，让我有种奇怪的预感…在塞涅俄丝挑战神明后，天空之子又遭遇了什么？
t_en: The scene here, and the previous memories, all give me a strange sense of foreboding... After Seliose challenged the gods, what else did the Skyfolk encounter?

t_ch: 我需要弄清传说的原貌，为了先祖们的灵魂能彻底安息。
t_en: I must unveil the true nature of the legend, so that my ancestors' souls may rest in peace.

t_ch: 风堇…真是个好孩子呀。放心吧，有人家在呢！
t_en: Hyacine... You're such a good child. Don't worry. I'm here!

t_ch: 这里翻涌的记忆，比入口处更加强烈…人家这就把它们凝结起来，捏捏、捏捏……
t_en: The memories surging here are even more intense than at the entrance... I'll gather them up now, and mold them, and mold them...

t_ch: …成功啦！
t_en: ...All done!

t_ch: 谢谢你，迷宝。各位，拜托了…和我一起见证历史吧。
t_en: Thank you, Memmie. Everyone, please... witness history with me.

t_ch: 灰宝，离开之前……
t_en: Grayie, before we go...

t_ch: 能和我一起见证历史吗？
t_en: Can you witness history with me?

t_ch: …黄昏之女，你终于还是步入疯狂了吗？
t_en: ...Daughter of Dusk, have you finally gone mad?

t_ch: 我就知道…融合了世仇的两族血脉的孩子，迟早会亲手毁灭天空之城。
t_en: I knew it... The child with the blood of two feuding clans will one day destroy the Sky Castrum.

t_ch: 你当真要把枪尖对准我们的神明？收手吧！你的鲁莽将会招引神罚……
t_en: Will you really point the tip of your spear at our god? Stay your hand! Your recklessness will only bring divine retribution...

t_ch: （晖之民们在与塞涅俄丝对峙…要聆听这段历史吗？）
t_en: (The Sunfolks are facing off against Seliose... Listen to this part of history?)

t_ch: 聆听塞涅俄丝和晖之民的对话。
t_en: Listen to the conversation between Seliose and the Sunfolk.

t_ch: 结束聆听，继续赶路。
t_en: Stop listening and move on.

t_ch: 英雄塞涅俄丝，她对晖之民的作为失望透顶，决定斩断一切的源头…他们信仰的神明。
t_en: The hero Seliose, disillusioned by the Sunfolk's deeds, decided to sever the source of it all... The god they so blindly placed their faith in.

t_ch: 那时的她心怀仁慈。哪怕言语激愤，心中却满载对人子的慈悲。
t_en: She was brimming with compassion at that time. Her words were bursting with anger, but her heart had nothing but mercy for the children of humanity.

t_ch: 那时…？
t_en: "At that time"...?

t_ch: …该离开了，雅辛忒丝。露奈比斯在等你们。
t_en: ...We should get going, Hyacinthia. Lunabis is waiting for you all.

t_ch: 「神罚」？
t_en: "Divine retribution"?

t_ch: 那些无辜的大地之子，只是产生了窥探「天外」的好奇心，就被高高在上的神明施以亡族灭国的审判……
t_en: Those innocent children of the earth were sentenced to total annihilation by the god above, while they had nothing more than mere curiosity for things that lie beyond the sky...

t_ch: 低头看看你们自己吧。自称烈阳之子的民族，却受不起这强光的照射，还把被烫得焦烂的肌肤当作神明的馈赠。
t_en: Look at yourselves. You call yourselves the Sunborn, and yet you're unable to bear the blinding sunlight. You even consider sunburns and blisters as a gift from the gods.

t_ch: 你们把自己认作神选之人、被艾格勒眷顾的强者，但却不敢对这世上真正的威胁宣战，只敢举剑挥向弱小的同胞。
t_en: You declare yourselves the chosen ones, champions favored by Aquila, yet you dare not even declare war upon the true threat of this world. Instead, you raise your swords and rattle them at your weaker brethren.

t_ch: 你们已经病入膏肓了…我的父亲亦是烈阳的信者，他教会了我坚韧和正直，让我向着光芒的方向一路前行——
t_en: You are all beyond saving... My father was also a disciple of the Sun, but he taught me resilience and justice and guided me toward the light...

t_ch: ——因为有光的地方就有希望。可怜的人，我在你们身上已经看不到希望…连藏在背光处的影子也比你们更具尊严！
t_en: ...He taught me wherever there is light, there is hope. Wretched people, I see no hope left in any of you... Even a shadow has more dignity than you lot!

t_ch: 即便如此，黄昏之女！即便如此，你也不该摧毁我们的信仰……
t_en: Even so, Daughter of Dusk! Even so, you should not shatter our faith...

t_ch: …何止是信仰！艾格勒塑造了天空，它就是天空本身——若它殒落了，这世界不知会变成哪般模样！
t_en: ...Not just our faith! Aquila forged the sky — nay, they are the sky itself! If they fall, what will this world turn into!?

t_ch: 从地平线的尽头传来了神谕。它昭告了一个崭新的时代，一个不被泰坦神明支配，而是由凡人英雄开创的时代。
t_en: A prophecy echoes from the horizon's edge. It heralds the advent of a new age, one not ruled by the Titans, but created by mortal heroes.

t_ch: 我选择相信！一切承诺打破旧世强加于我们的枷锁，带给我们掀开新篇章的预兆…我唯有相信！
t_en: I choose to believe in that prophecy! I must believe in any sign that promises to break the chains imposed on us by the old era... Any sign that will lead us to a new chapter of the world!

t_ch: 若想阻止我弑神，那你们最好鼓起勇气，拉满长弓。看看是我先被万千支箭矢贯穿…还是你们先被索拉比斯的烈焰燃尽！
t_en: If you wish to stop me from slaying the god, you'd better muster your courage and draw your bows. Let's see if I will be pierced by a hail of arrows first... or if you will be burned to ash by Solabis!

t_ch: 我们要怎么对抗你？你是强大的阳雷骑士，是力敌万邦的女武神……
t_en: How can we even fight you? You're the powerful Daythunder Knight, a warrior goddess capable of trampling all lands...

t_ch: 我不是神——我只是身处这座牢笼之中，唯一一个有勇气反抗典狱者的凡人。
t_en: I am not a god, but the only mortal in this cage who is brave enough to defy the warden.

t_ch: 记忆中的晖之民们陷入了沉默。哪怕在烈日光芒的修饰下，他们的神情仍然暗如尘灰。
t_en: The Sunfolks in the memory fall silent. Their expressions are ashen despite being under the bright sunlight.

t_ch: 看吧…你们果真懦弱至极。
t_en: See... You are all truly weak beyond measure.

t_ch: 猎场在呼唤我们。走吧，索拉比斯。
t_en: The hunting ground beckons. Come, Solabis.

t_ch: 英雄塞涅俄丝，她对晖之民的作为失望透顶，决定斩断一切的源头…他们信仰的神明。
t_en: The hero Seliose, disillusioned by the Sunfolk's deeds, decided to sever the source of it all... The god they so blindly placed their faith in.

t_ch: 那时的她心怀仁慈。哪怕言语激愤，心中却满载对人子的慈悲。
t_en: She was brimming with compassion at that time. Her words were bursting with anger, but her heart had nothing but mercy for the children of humanity.

t_ch: 那时…？
t_en: "At that time"...?

t_ch: …该离开了，雅辛忒丝。露奈比斯在等你们。
t_en: ...We should get going, Hyacinthia. Lunabis is waiting for you all.

t_ch: 露奈比斯阁下，我们来了！
t_en: Lady Lunabis, we're here!

t_ch: 艾格勒，尽管已被黑潮腐蚀……
t_en: Aquila... Even though they have been corrupted by the black tide...

t_ch: 但它仍与这堡垒中的眷属维持着联系。
t_en: They still maintain a connection with their Kin in this fortress.

t_ch: 身后也有…保持阵型，当心包围！
t_en: They're behind us as well... Maintain formation, and don't get surrounded!

t_ch: 想阻挠我们吗，被囚禁的泰坦？
t_en: You think to hinder us, imprisoned Titan?

t_ch: 那么，我们会让你明白…这是无谓的挣扎！
t_en: Then, we will make you understand... that resistance is futile!

t_ch: 化身印记——它飞向画壁的另一侧了。
t_en: The mark of manifestation. It fled to the other side of the mural.

t_ch: 继续追击，跟着它找到泰坦。即便已经坠入疯狂，艾格勒仍是天空的泰坦…决不能轻敌。
t_en: Don't stop. Follow it to the Titan. Even if plunged into madness, Aquila is still the Sky Titan... We mustn't let our guard down.

t_ch: 英雄们，这里——
t_en: Heroes, over here!

t_ch: 以下一个「西风罗盘」为目标前进吧，
t_en: Let's keep going and aim for the next West Wind Compass.

t_ch: 这是…描绘哪位泰坦的画像？
t_en: Which Titan is this?

t_ch: 好像和我翻阅过的所有翁法罗斯神话，都联系不起来。
t_en: It doesn't seem to match any of the Amphorean myths I've read.

t_ch: 也许古代天空文明对泰坦的诠释和我们完全不同。
t_en: Maybe the ancient sky civilization had a completely different interpretation of the Titans from ours.

t_ch: 但我同意你说的话…这个形象…看起来有些过于陌生了。
t_en: But I agree with you... This figure... looks way too alien.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的满溢之杯，壁画上描绘了它的破裂。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s Chalice of Plenty... This mural depicts its breaking.

t_ch: 虽然天空与海洋的对立不算严重…但很显然，艾格勒的子民对后者的态度也算不上友善。
t_en: Though the conflict between sky and ocean wasn't particularly severe... it is obvious that Aquila's people weren't exactly cordial to the latter.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}，艾格勒的夙敌。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, Aquila's nemesis.

t_ch: 和互惠共生的创生三泰坦不同…天空和大地从未停止过对彼此的中伤和讥讽。
t_en: Unlike the Three Titans of Creation that co-exist in mutual benefit... the sky and the earth never ceased attacking each other.

t_ch: 但脱离了天空文明的昏光庭院来到凡间生活时，才发现大地同样有着温柔宽厚的一面。
t_en: But when the Twilight Courtyard left the sky civilization and came down to the mortal realm to live, they discovered that the earth also possessed a gentle, benevolent side.

t_ch: 人与人，城邦与城邦，神明与神明…我想，一切争斗都源于我们对彼此的误解吧？
t_en: Whether between people, cities, and gods... I suppose that all conflicts stem from misunderstandings.

t_ch: 看啊，彩虹桥在引领我们前往下一个目的地。
t_en: Look, the rainbow bridge is leading us to our next destination.

t_ch: 继续赶路吧，跟上露奈比斯阁下。
t_en: Let's hurry on. Follow Lady Lunabis.

t_ch: 毫无疑问，这张壁画描绘的就是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}了。
t_en: No question about it. This mural depicts the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 好大个眼睛。
t_en: What a big eye.

t_ch: 这是艾格勒在神话中最常见的形态。
t_en: This is Aquila's most common form in the myths.

t_ch: 它真长这样吗？
t_en: Do they really look like that?

t_ch: 这应该叫…概括的艺术？
t_en: Perhaps this could be called... concept art?

t_ch: 艾格勒在神话中最常见的形态，就是一只巨大的天空之眼。
t_en: Aquila's most common form in the myths looks exactly like a giant eye in the sky.

t_ch: 看着没什么压迫感。
t_en: Doesn't look very foreboding.

t_ch: 艾格勒曾和鼎盛时期的尼卡多利展开漫长的拉锯…还是不要小看它为好。
t_en: Aquila once engaged in a long, grueling struggle with Nikador in their prime... Best not to underestimate them.

t_ch: 走吧。不出意外，我们很快就能一睹它的真容了。
t_en: Let's go. If nothing goes wrong, we'll be able to see their true form very quickly.

t_ch: 现在…我将带领诸位进入雨之民的殿堂。
t_en: Now... I shall lead you into the Rainfolk's hall.

t_ch: 聆听塞涅俄丝童年的故事。
t_en: Listen to Seliose's childhood story.

t_ch: 抓紧赶路吧。
t_en: Let's hurry.
...Doot!

t_ch: 啊，小伊卡——你怎么自顾自跑出来了？
t_en: Ah, Little Ica — why did you run out on your own?

t_ch: 这个小家伙，它是……
t_en: This little one...

t_ch: 嘟…嘟，嘟！
t_en: Doot... Doot, doot!

t_ch: 你是说…你在露奈比斯阁下身上，闻到了熟悉的气息？
t_en: You're saying... You smell a familiar scent on Lady Lunabis?

t_ch: 虽然形象上堪称天差地别，但说起来…小伊卡应该也是一只翼兽吧？
t_en: They look completely different, but... Little Ica should also be a winged beast, right?

t_ch: 难道……
t_en: Could it be...

t_ch: 嘟！嘟嘟！
t_en: Doot! Doot-Doot!

t_ch: 真是命运的奇迹。说不定，我们还是给这世界留下了些什么啊…塞涅俄丝。
t_en: Truly a miracle of fate. Perhaps, we did leave something behind for this world... Seliose.

t_ch: 露奈比斯…阁下？
t_en: Lady... Lunabis?

t_ch: 莫非，小伊卡是你的……
t_en: Is Little Ica your...

t_ch: …请继续前进吧，逐火的英雄们。我能感觉到，艾格勒的光芒愈发强烈了。
t_en: ...Please press on, flame-chasing heroes. I can sense it — the radiance of Aquila shines ever brighter.

t_ch: 传说塞涅俄丝的父亲是一位晖之民战士，终日在外漂泊征战，很少回到晨昏之眼。她的童年，更多是在身为雨之民祭司的母亲身边度过的。
t_en: Legend has it Seliose's father was a Sunfolk warrior who spent his years fighting and rarely returned to the Eye of Twilight. Her childhood was mostly spent beside her mother, a Rainfolk priest.

t_ch: 不错，这是真实的历史。也正是在她年幼之时，两个民族的矛盾开始激化。雨之民畏惧塞涅俄丝的另一半血脉，从未真正将她视为同胞。
t_en: Correct. That was true. It was also during her formative years that the conflict between the two tribes began intensifying. The Rainfolk feared the other half of Seliose's bloodline, and never truly saw her as one of their own.

t_ch: 真是糟糕的童年。
t_en: What a terrible childhood.

t_ch: 在这种环境下成长，她…
t_en: Growing up in such an environment, she...

t_ch: 但她没有憎恨那些族人，依然长成了一名热情的少女。
t_en: Yet she bore no hatred for her people, and still grew into a passionate young lady.

t_ch: 直到…人们发现她的体内还流淌着黄金色的血液。那是将嫌恶转变为恐惧的最后一剂毒药。
t_en: Until... people discovered golden blood ran through her veins. That was the final straw that turned disdain into terror.

t_ch: 什么？史诗的说法是，英雄塞涅俄丝曾离群独居，只为磨砺意志、锻炼武艺。
t_en: What!? But the epics said Seliose left to live in solitude so she could train her spirit and hone her martial skills.

t_ch: 没想到…她是因为血统和黄金裔的身份被驱逐出了族群？
t_en: I never would have imagined that she... was cast out of her tribe for her lineage and her golden blood.

t_ch: 即便如此，她仍然没有对世界感到绝望。正是在独自旅居的途中，她邂逅了我和索拉比斯。我们一同狩猎、成长、生活，结为同盟。
t_en: Even so, she did not despair. She met Solabis and me while she was living alone. We hunted and spent our days together, and forged an alliance.

t_ch: 我想，正是那比命运更坚实的誓约将我和索拉比斯留在了这里，一直守望着这座孤寂的堡垒。
t_en: I think that oath, stronger than fate itself, kept Solabis and me here to watch over this abandoned fortress.

t_ch: 哪怕经历了背叛和驱逐，她依然愿意为族人踏上弑神的征途。
t_en: Despite experiencing betrayal and exile at the hands of her own people, she was still willing to set out on the path to slay the gods for them.

t_ch: 英雄塞涅俄丝，她对人子的博爱…也是深沉且无条件的么？
t_en: Was Seliose's love for humanity truly so... boundless and unconditional?
...Doot!

t_ch: 啊，小伊卡——你怎么自顾自跑出来了？
t_en: Ah, Little Ica — why did you run out on your own?

t_ch: 这个小家伙，它是……
t_en: This little one...

t_ch: 嘟…嘟，嘟！
t_en: Doot... Doot, doot!

t_ch: 你是说…你在露奈比斯阁下身上，闻到了熟悉的气息？
t_en: You're saying... You smell a familiar scent on Lady Lunabis?

t_ch: 虽然形象上堪称天差地别，但说起来…小伊卡应该也是一只翼兽吧？
t_en: They look completely different, but... Little Ica should also be a winged beast, right?

t_ch: 难道……
t_en: Could it be...

t_ch: 嘟！嘟嘟！
t_en: Doot! Doot-Doot!

t_ch: 真是命运的奇迹。说不定，我们还是给这世界留下了些什么啊…塞涅俄丝。
t_en: Truly a miracle of fate. Perhaps, we did leave something behind for this world... Seliose.

t_ch: 露奈比斯…阁下？
t_en: Lady... Lunabis?

t_ch: 莫非，小伊卡是你的……
t_en: Is Little Ica your...

t_ch: …请继续前进吧，逐火的英雄们。我能感觉到，艾格勒的光芒愈发强烈了。
t_en: ...Please press on, flame-chasing heroes. I can sense it — the radiance of Aquila shines ever brighter.

t_ch: 艾格勒——它果然在这里。
t_en: Aquila — they are indeed here.

t_ch: 浑象仪在前方…被黑潮造物把守着。
t_en: The celestial globe is right ahead... but there are black tide creatures guarding it.

t_ch: 看来会是一场绕不开的恶战，那就直面它吧。
t_en: Looks like we can't skip this fight. Let's go get them.

t_ch: 又是那个能增幅祷言的装置——{NICKNAME}，能交给你吗？
t_en: It's another one of those devices that can enhance prayers. Can I leave that to you, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 被黑潮侵蚀的眷属…看起来比之前的都要强大。
t_en: A Titankin that was corroded by the black tide... It seems it's stronger than before.

t_ch: 在被疯狂彻底吞没前，它也曾是泰坦忠实的随从吧？
t_en: Before it was consumed by madness, it must have also faithfully served the Titan, don't you think?

t_ch: 没有哪位医者能治愈一切，面对深陷痛苦而无法被拯救的灵魂……
t_en: No healer can heal all, especially faced with souls that are trapped deeply in the clutches of pain...

t_ch: 让它获得体面的解脱，或许就是最温柔的做法。
t_en: Granting it a dignified end may be the most compassionate act of all.

t_ch: 安歇吧，眷属。
t_en: Rest now, Titankin.

t_ch: 这台浑象仪，看上去很完整……
t_en: This celestial globe looks complete...

t_ch: 但还是无法启动…是内部故障吗？
t_en: But it still won't start... Is there something wrong internally?

t_ch: 也可能不是损坏，只是缺少了能源驱动。
t_en: Maybe it's not damaged, but is missing an energy source.

t_ch: 看那边，那些像硬盘一样的巨大物体——
t_en: Look there, those massive objects that look like hard drives...

t_ch: 硬…盘？
t_en: Hard... drives?

t_ch: 咳…抱歉，我换个说法。看到两侧<color=#dbc291ff>那些泛着蓝光的大型结构了吗？</color>其中有几块突了出来，没有完整地嵌在槽中。
t_en: Ahem... Sorry, let me rephrase. Do you see the <color=#dbc291ff>two structures that are glowing blue on both sides?</color> Some of them are protruding out, not fully inserted into the slots.

t_ch: 直觉告诉我，或许它们和浑象仪的能源有关联。
t_en: My intuition tells me that they have something to do with the energy source of the celestial globe.

t_ch: 你的直觉一向很准。附近找找吧，看看有没有什么机关……
t_en: Your intuition has always been good. Let's look around and see if there are any mechanisms...

t_ch: …呵，得来全不费工夫。扎格列斯之手，总会在最需要的时候出现。
t_en: ...Heh, that didn't take much effort. The Hand of Zagreus always appears when it's most needed.

t_ch: 露奈比斯阁下，麻烦你再稍等我们片刻了。
t_en: Lady Lunabis, if it's not too much trouble, please wait for a little longer...?

t_ch: 要劳烦的是你们。我已在此处徘徊千年之久，这一时片刻根本算不得「等待」。
t_en: It's you all who have to do the work. I've wandered around here for a thousand years, so this brief moment hardly qualifies as "waiting."

t_ch: 更何况……
t_en: Furthermore...

t_ch: 嘟…嘟？
t_en: Doot... Doot?

t_ch: …我正好想与这小家伙独处片刻。
t_en: ...I would like to have a moment alone with this little one.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟嘟，嘟……
t_en: Doot... doot-doot, doot...

t_ch: 你的父母，还有他们的父母…一直都陪伴在天空后裔身边吗？
t_en: Your parents, and their parents... Have they always been by the Skyfolk's side?

t_ch: 这…多么令人欣慰啊。
t_en: That is... quite comforting.

t_ch: 浑象仪还无法运作…先想办法给它补充能源吧。
t_en: The celestial globe still isn't working... Let's find a way to supply it with energy first.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, where are you going?

t_ch: 外面可能有发疯的泰坦眷属，还是不要擅自行动了。
t_en: There might still be rampaging Titankin outside, so it's best not to act alone.

t_ch: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
t_en: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

t_ch: 「遮蔽烈阳吧，『天象画壁』！」
t_en: "Blot out the blazing sun, Celestial Mural!"

t_ch: 艾格勒，它离开了。
t_en: Aquila has left.

t_ch: 我们已经修改了两处画壁的天象，它还能去往哪里？
t_en: We've already changed two scenes on the Mural. Where else can they go?

t_ch: 沿着天空子民终日祈望的方向——向上。
t_en: In the direction that the denizens of the sky have prayed to their whole lives — upward.

t_ch: 它…会飞到云层之外，我们无法企及的高度吗？
t_en: Will they... fly beyond the clouds, to heights that are beyond our reach?

t_ch: 据我们所知，正是艾格勒对世间降下了诅咒，禁止翁法罗斯人触碰天空之外的世界。
t_en: As far as we know, it was Aquila that placed the curse on this world, preventing Amphoreans from ever reaching the realm beyond the sky.

t_ch: 天空降下的诅咒……
t_en: A curse that fell from the sky...

t_ch: 我无法证实这种说法的真伪。随塞涅俄丝与艾格勒交战时，那泰坦的化身也曾飞向高空…但它好像从未试图突破天幕，以躲避我们的追击。
t_en: I can't verify the truth of this claim. When Seliose fought Aquila, the Titan's incarnation did ascend into the skies... But they never attempted to break through the sky's veil to escape our pursuit.

t_ch: 说不定它不想胜之不武。
t_en: It could also be that they didn't want to win unfairly.

t_ch: 也有一种可能…那就是艾格勒——即使作为执掌天空神权的泰坦——也无法突破天空。
t_en: There's also another possibility... Maybe even Aquila — the Titan wielding the divine authority of the sky — is not able to break through the sky.

t_ch: 莫非它也无法突破天穹？
t_en: Could it be that they, too, were unable to break through the heavens?

t_ch: 不无这种可能。
t_en: It is not impossible.

t_ch: 也许对神话的解读是错误的…想阻止翁法罗斯人接触天外之界的，可能另有其人。
t_en: Perhaps the interpretation of the myth is inaccurate... It might be someone else who seeks to prevent Amphoreans from reaching the world beyond the sky.

t_ch: 真相如何，也只有在打倒它以后才能获知了。
t_en: Regardless, we can only know the truth after we've defeated them.

t_ch: 但在继续追击前…{NICKNAME}、迷迷，为风堇揭开历史的面纱吧。传说的真相，还未完全明朗。
t_en: Before we press on... {NICKNAME}, Mem, let's unveil the history for Hyacine. The true story behind the legend is yet to be fully revealed.

t_ch: 嗯，交给人家吧！
t_en: Okay, leave it to me!

t_ch: 流动…汇聚……
t_en: Flowing... Gathering...

t_ch: 追忆…显形！
t_en: Recollection... Reveal!

t_ch: 等等，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Hang on, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我也对那位「阳雷骑士」的故事有些好奇…阅读这段记忆再走吧？
t_en: I'm also curious about the story of the Daythunder Knight... Why don't we read this part of the memory before leaving?

t_ch: 黄昏之女，是谁允许你回到这阴云之子的圣地？你同时身负异端的血统和黄金的诅咒，驱逐是对你永久的惩罚。
t_en: Oh, Daughter of Dusk, who has permitted your return to this sacred land of the Cloudborn? Bearing the blood of heresy and curse of gold, exile is your eternal sentence.

t_ch: 聆听塞涅俄丝与雨之民的对话。
t_en: Listen to the conversation between Seliose and the Rainfolk.

t_ch: 结束聆听，继续赶路。
t_en: Stop listening and move on.

t_ch: 继续追随艾格勒飞离的轨迹吧，英雄们。这一次，我会和索拉比斯一同引导你们前行。
t_en: Follow the trail Aquila has left, heroes. This time, I will guide you alongside Solabis.

t_ch: 嘟嘟…嘟？
t_en: Doot-Doot... Doot?

t_ch: 抱歉，小家伙…希望此后我们还有时间一起聊天。
t_en: Sorry, little one... I hope we still have time to talk later.

t_ch: 我曾经的族人啊…如今的我已不再是那只尚未成熟的雏鸟，我找到了自己的羽翼。
t_en: My kin of old... I am no longer the immature fledgling I once was. I've found my wings.

t_ch: 你们给我套上的枷锁已经锈蚀脱落，我将决定自己应飞向何方。
t_en: The shackles you bound me with have rusted away, and I shall decide which direction I'll fly.

t_ch: 至于此番回乡——在我踏上弑神的征程前，信仰将死之神的人们理应知晓一切。
t_en: As for this return home — before I embark on my god-slaying quest, those who worship the god who is about to die deserve to know everything.

t_ch: 所以，那可怕的传言是真的……
t_en: So, the dreadful rumors are true...

t_ch: 受诅咒的黄昏之女，战无不胜的阳雷骑士，将会飞入云霄，挑战泰坦……
t_en: The cursed Daughter of Dusk, the invincible Daythunder Knight, will soar into the heavens to challenge the Titan...

t_ch: 你为何要这么做，塞涅俄丝？你曾是多么热情善良的女孩…在这阴云之子的殿堂里，你曾多么虔诚地向艾格勒祷告！
t_en: Why would you do this, Seliose? You were once such a warm-hearted girl... In this hall of the Cloudborn, you prayed so devoutly to Aquila!

t_ch: 因为我看清了泰坦的冷漠，也看厌了凡人在它的漠视之下跳起的悲哀舞步。
t_en: I've seen through the Titan's indifference, and grown weary of the tragic dances mortals perform under their neglect.

t_ch: 我看到了你们怪怨神的偏袒，却不敢对那信仰的中心起丝毫的反抗之心。你们懂得如何将刀子插进同胞的后背，却从未有勇气追溯仇恨的源头。
t_en: I see how you blame the god for their favoritism, yet lack the courage to rebel against the core of your beliefs. You're quick to turn your blades on your kin, but you never dare to confront the true source of your hatred.

t_ch: 我怜悯你们。我在你们之中长大，也一度将自己视为这部族的一员……
t_en: I feel sorry for you. I grew up among you and once saw myself as part of this tribe...

t_ch: 你们受到的迫害已经足够深重。为此，我理解你们对我的憎恶…并原谅你们将我驱逐的决定。
t_en: The persecution you've suffered runs deep. For that, I understand your hatred towards me... and I forgive you for casting me out.

t_ch: 也正因我怜悯你们，我将替你们所有人踏上这次征程——
t_en: Out of care for you all, I'll walk this path — on behalf of everyone.

t_ch: 就让「晨昏之眼」的陨落成为一段崭新历史的开篇吧。在我归来后，世上将不再有不公的神明……
t_en: Let the fall of the "Eye of Twilight" mark the dawn of a new chapter in history. Upon my return, there will be no more unjust gods...

t_ch: 当病态的信仰溃散，人子将迎来新生，阴晴得到弥合、晨昏不再分割。
t_en: When a broken faith finally disappears, the children of humanity will be reborn, the skies will mend, and the divide between day and night will fade away.

t_ch: 你是多么单纯啊，黄昏之女…那么强大，却那么天真……
t_en: You are so naive, Daughter of Dusk... so powerful, yet so innocent...

t_ch: 我畏惧你…我难以想象，当你发现浅薄且脆弱的凡人无法承受你那沉重的博爱时，会变成多么扭曲的模样……
t_en: I fear you... I can't imagine how twisted you may become when you realize that shallow and fragile mortals can't bear the immense weight of your boundless love...

t_ch: …再见了，我的族人。我会记住你们曾经赐予我的，如绵绵细雨般微薄却清沁的温柔。
t_en: ...Farewell, my kin. I'll always remember the tenderness you once showed me. Meager but refreshing, like gentle rain.

t_ch: 飞吧，露奈比斯。
t_en: Fly, Lunabis.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝大人…她弑杀泰坦的态度有多坚定，她在和族人告别时的语气就有多悲凉。
t_en: Lady Seliose's resolve to slay the Titan was as firm as her farewell to her people was dismal.

t_ch: 但我却从这段记忆里感受到了不祥的征兆…后来发生了什么，露奈比斯阁下？
t_en: Yet, from this memory, I sense something ominous... What happened later, Lady Lunabis?

t_ch: 诸位与其听我诉说，不如继续前进、见证。
t_en: Rather than listening to me, continue onward and witness for yourselves.

t_ch: 继续追随艾格勒飞离的轨迹吧，英雄们。这一次，我会和索拉比斯一同引导你们前行。
t_en: Follow the trail Aquila has left, heroes. This time, I will guide you alongside Solabis.

t_ch: 嘟嘟…嘟？
t_en: Doot-Doot... Doot?

t_ch: 抱歉，小家伙…希望此后我们还有时间一起聊天。
t_en: Sorry, little one... I hope we still have time to talk later.

t_ch: 它飞向了画壁的穹顶…我记得那里。
t_en: They soared toward the mural's dome... I remember that place.

t_ch: 我也记得，索拉比斯。
t_en: I remember too, Solabis.

t_ch: 聆听：塞涅俄丝与艾格勒的决战
t_en: Listen to the final battle between Seliose and Aquila

t_ch: 抓紧赶路吧。
t_en: Let's hurry.

t_ch: 既然你已下定了决心，那就继续前行吧。
t_en: Since you've made your decision, keep moving forward.

t_ch: 我已唤来了虹桥。沿着它行进，在穹顶了结人子与那泰坦的命运纠葛吧。
t_en: I've called forth the Rainbow Bridge. Proceed along its path to the dome where the entwined fates of humanity and the Titan must be resolved.

t_ch: 那里…发生了什么？
t_en: What exactly... happened there?

t_ch: 在天象画壁的穹顶，我们给艾格勒带去了致命的一击。
t_en: At the Celestial Mural's dome, we dealt Aquila a fatal blow.

t_ch: 「烈阳之翼」点燃了泰坦的羽翼……
t_en: The Sunlit Wings set the Titan's Wings aflame...

t_ch: 「星月之翎」封锁了泰坦的神躯……
t_en: The Moonlit Plume sealed the divine body...

t_ch: 「伤痕累累的天空英雄…将那最后一只恫世的巨眼穿透。」
t_en: "The battered hero of the sky... pierced the last monstrous eye."

t_ch: 看来，传说中描绘决战情景的这一段相当写实呢。
t_en: It seems that the legend describing the decisive battle was true.

t_ch: 但总有些事无法被记录下来——那些只有我们见证的事。
t_en: But some things cannot be recorded — they were only witnessed by us.

t_ch: …介意同我述说吗，两位阁下？
t_en: ...Would you mind sharing more, honored ones?

t_ch: 艾格勒发出落败的尖啸后，我们望向了地面。
t_en: After Aquila's defeated scream, we looked to the ground.

t_ch: 那些仰望我们拼杀的人们——我们看到了他们脸上的神色。
t_en: The people who watched us fight — we saw the expressions on their faces.

t_ch: 老人，壮年，青年，幼童。他们无不挂着相同的表情：无以复加的恐惧。
t_en: Old and young, adults and children alike, they all shared the same expression — pure, unshakable terror.

t_ch: 我们的胜利没有迎来欢呼或庆贺。恐惧的人群乱作一团，放声哭喊，相互践踏……
t_en: Our victory brought no cheers or celebrations. The terrified crowd became chaotic, screaming and trampling each other...

t_ch: 当他们意识到，自己千百年来的信仰竟被一个身负诅咒的混血儿颠覆之后……
t_en: When they realized that their centuries-old faith had been overturned by a cursed child of two clans...

t_ch: 他们退化成了失去理性，同类相残的兽。不…这种说法是对兽性的侮辱。即便在翁法罗斯最荒蛮的山林间，我和索拉比斯亦从未目睹过那般疯狂。
t_en: They regressed into senseless beasts that devoured their own kin. No... that would be an insult to beasts. Solabis and I have never witnessed such madness, not even in the wildest corners of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 这个结果…可以预见。
t_en: This outcome... was foreseeable.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝，那位英雄…她的想法的确有些天真。
t_en: Seliose... was indeed rather naive.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝的确太天真了。
t_en: Seliose was indeed naive.

t_ch: 她或许以为，破釜沉舟之下，所有人都能像她一样觉醒。
t_en: She probably thought that, once there's no turning back, everyone would come to their sense like she did.

t_ch: 信仰让他们走火入魔。
t_en: Their faith drove them mad.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝，那位英雄…她的想法的确有些天真。
t_en: Seliose... was indeed rather naive.

t_ch: 但…这和历史的记载不同。天空一族流传的神话中，艾格勒重伤之下，意图鱼死网破……
t_en: This doesn't align with the historical records. According to the legends of the Sky people, Aquila, gravely wounded, was determined to fight to the end...

t_ch: 为了阻止艾格勒将整个翁法罗斯的天幕作为武器砸向大地，英雄塞涅俄丝选择牺牲自己，封印泰坦……
t_en: To prevent Aquila from using the sky of Amphoreus as a weapon to crush the earth, the hero Seliose chose to sacrifice herself, sealing the Titan in the process...

t_ch: …抹去残酷、流血和平庸者的悲歌，放大英雄的荣光、赞颂他们的功绩——史诗和传说，自古如此。
t_en: ...Legends and epics have always erased the cruelty, the bloodshed, and the cries of the commoners, while glorifying the heroes and their triumphs.

t_ch: 你会看到传说不为人知的一面，年轻的雅辛忒丝。面对尘封千年的真相，你的步伐还能否如此坚定？
t_en: You'll witness a side of the legend that's never been told, young Hyacinthia. With a truth hidden for a millennium before you, can you still walk with the same conviction?

t_ch: 那会是个残酷的真相，注定动摇你的信念。你准备好面对它了吗，风堇姑娘？
t_en: It will be a harsh truth, one that is bound to shake your beliefs. Are you ready to face it, Miss Hyacine?

t_ch: 我准备好了，两位阁下。
t_en: I am ready, honored ones.

t_ch: 无论那被尘封的历史是什么模样，先祖们的灵魂都会鼓励我做出正确的决定。这份使命，它的重量远大于我自身的好恶与私见。
t_en: No matter what the hidden history holds, the spirits of my ancestors will urge me to make the right choice. This mission is far more important than my personal feelings or biases.

t_ch: 如果我要面对的是被篡改的历史，一个传承千年的谎言…那么我愿意相信，那个编织谎言的人也一定有自己的理由跟苦衷。
t_en: If what I'm facing is a distorted history, a lie that's lasted for a thousand years... I have to believe the one who created it had their reasons and struggles.

t_ch: 而那个理由，我也愿意假定它出于善意——因为这就是我看待世界的方式，我的选择。
t_en: And as for those reasons, I choose to believe they came from a place of goodwill. That's how I see the world.

t_ch: 既然你已下定了决心，那就继续前行吧。
t_en: Since you've made your decision, keep moving forward.

t_ch: 我已唤来了虹桥。沿着它行进，在穹顶了结人子与那泰坦的命运纠葛吧。
t_en: I've called forth the Rainbow Bridge. Proceed along its path to the dome where the entwined fates of humanity and the Titan must be resolved.

t_ch: 当心…！
t_en: Careful...!

t_ch: 它还在挣扎，想阻止我们…但我们已经把它逼入绝境了。
t_en: They're desperately struggling to block our path, but we've backed them into a corner.

t_ch: 和漫长的逐火之旅相比，这点障碍算不上什么。
t_en: This hurdle is trivial compared to the endless Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 不管那位泰坦要阻挠我们几次…我都会重新建起桥梁！
t_en: I'll restore the bridge every time... No matter how many times the Titan obstructs us!

t_ch: 她曾念念不忘的奇迹…只差一步便能化作现实了啊。
t_en: The miracle she never stopped dreaming of... is just one step away from becoming reality.

t_ch: 两位阁下…塞涅俄丝大人是如何变得如此强大的？
t_en: Honored ones... how did Lady Seliose become so powerful?

t_ch: 天赋，以及苦修。
t_en: Talent, and rigorous training.

t_ch: 这…听上去是每位成功者必备的特征。
t_en: Those... sound like essential traits for every successful individual.

t_ch: 她很特殊。她的决心，比偏执更甚。
t_en: She is special. Her resolve goes beyond mere stubbornness.

t_ch: 沿着彩虹桥继续前进吧，英雄们。
t_en: Continue forward along the Rainbow Bridge, heroes.

t_ch: 这就是天象画壁的穹顶么…真是令人称奇。
t_en: Is this the dome of the celestial mural? It's truly marvelous.

t_ch: 穹顶呈现的仍是烈日的图景。只要让阴云也布满此处的画壁，艾格勒就无处可去了吧？
t_en: The dome still displays a vivid sun. By also covering this mural in clouds, we'll leave Aquila with no place to hide.

t_ch: 没错。用诸位已经熟悉的手段让它无处可藏，然后……
t_en: Exactly. Employ the tactics you've mastered to expose them, and...

t_ch: …雅辛忒丝，我们将服从你的意愿，将力量借予诸位，令艾格勒的本体现身。
t_en: ...Hyacinthia, we will heed your wishes, channeling our strength to reveal Aquila's true form.

t_ch: 我的意愿……
t_en: My wishes...

t_ch: 千年了，若非有约定傍身，我和露奈比斯恐怕早已和此处的其它事物一般弥散。
t_en: It's been a thousand years. Without our pact, Lunabis and I might have dissipated like everything else here.

t_ch: 那约定要我们等待天空之子重返故地…完成回收泰坦火种的使命。
t_en: Our pact requires us to await the return of the Skyfolk to their ancestral lands... to complete the mission of reclaiming the Titan's Coreflame.

t_ch: 我们会执行你的意志，风堇姑娘，一如我们曾遵守对塞涅俄丝的承诺。
t_en: We will carry out your will, Miss Hyacine, as faithfully as we kept our promise to Seliose.

t_ch: 但在那之前…我们会先揭示历史的全部真相——
t_en: But first, we shall reveal the whole truth of history —

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——在英雄塞涅俄丝开启逐火之旅后，天空之民所遭遇的一切。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>— We will reveal all that befell the Skyfolk after Seliose initiated the Flame-Chase Journey.</color>

t_ch: …理应如此。
t_en: ...As it should be.

t_ch: 小心——有威胁，而且不止一个！
t_en: Be careful! There are multiple threats!

t_ch: 更多被黑潮侵染的士兵…过了这么久，它还在守护天空泰坦的领域吗？
t_en: Soldiers tainted by the black tide... Do they continue to defend the realm of the Sky Titan after all this time?

t_ch: 也许它们是在守护长眠于此的真相。
t_en: Perhaps they are protecting the truth slumbering here.

t_ch: 除了约定中的天空后裔，无人有权阅读此处的记忆。
t_en: Aside from the descendants of the sky named in the pact, no one else is entitled to access the memories here.

t_ch: 在那之后到底发生了什么…我也越发好奇了。
t_en: I'm increasingly intrigued by what happened next.

t_ch: 先打败这些堕落的守卫，然后……
t_en: Let's deal with these fallen guards first, then...

t_ch: …再来上这最后一堂历史课吧！
t_en: ...embark on this final lesson in history!

t_ch: 你们履行了自己的职责，卫士…安歇吧。
t_en: You have fulfilled your duty, guards... Rest now.

t_ch: 天空的神明，我们来了…你的怨愤和惶恐很快就会结束。
t_en: God of the Sky, we are here... Your resentment and terror will soon end.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝大人…与泰坦融为一体后，你还维持着人类的意识吗？我希望你能看到，自己种下的种子结出了怎样的果实。
t_en: Lady Seliose... do you still have your humanity after merging with the Titan? I hope you can witness the harvest of the seeds you once sowed.

t_ch: 现在…就只剩下最后的几步了。
t_en: Now... only the final steps remain.

t_ch: …不对劲。
t_en: ...Something's off.

t_ch: 人家能清晰地感觉到，这里的记忆在翻涌。就好像…有许多感情在漫长的岁月中彷徨，不愿就此消失。
t_en: I can feel the memories here churning. It's as if countless emotions have lingered through the ages, refusing to fade away.

t_ch: 是因为什么？
t_en: Why is that?

t_ch: 闹鬼了？
t_en: Is it haunted?

t_ch: 那些在这里游荡的记忆，他们似乎在祈求什么…好痛苦，好委屈……
t_en: The wandering memories here seem to be pleading for something... heavy with pain and grief...

t_ch: 就像…在冥河边徘徊的魂灵……
t_en: Like ghosts lingering by the River of Souls...

t_ch: 你准备好了么，风堇？
t_en: Are you ready, Hyacine?

t_ch: 嗯。逐火之旅已然走到最后，无论所谓的历史真相如何残酷，任何事都不会动摇我完成使命的决心。
t_en: Yes. The Flame-Chase Journey is reaching its final chapter. No matter how cruel the truth may be, nothing will sway my determination to finish this mission.

t_ch: 但被尘封的历史真相也必须重见天日，因为凡人的命运不该被经过美化的传说淹没。
t_en: The true history buried in time must come to light. The fates of mortals shouldn't be lost beneath polished myths.

t_ch: 我们的想法完全一致，白厄阁下。
t_en: We're on the same page, Lord Phainon.

t_ch: 去接触浑象仪吧，雅辛忒丝。
t_en: Go to the celestial globe, Hyacinthia.

t_ch: 那些被世界遗忘的过往会在你眼前一一重现。牢牢抓住你那不可动摇的信念，你会需要它的支撑。
t_en: The forgotten past will reveal itself to you, one fragment at a time. Hold fast to your resolve — you'll need it to face what lies ahead.

t_ch: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
t_en: Dear Seliose,

t_ch: 最近过得还好吗？距你离开奥莱诺斯已经过了几个月啦，*我们*很想念在一起的那段时光。
t_en: How have you been lately? It's been a few months since you left Oleinus, and we really miss the times we spent together.

t_ch: 那时，我们一起在乡间奔跑、玩耍，到了晚上就去逗弄邻居家那头坏脾气的大地兽，每天都过得无忧无虑，好像世间所有的烦恼和灾难都与我们无关……
t_en: We'd run and play in the countryside, and in the evenings, we'd mess with the grumpy dromas from next door. Every day was carefree as if the troubles of the world had nothing to do with us...

t_ch: 自*我们*和姐妹们分开以来，和你在一起的那段时光，就是*我们*最美妙的记忆啦。
t_en: Since we parted with our sisters, the time spent with you has become our most cherished memories.

t_ch: 老实说，听说你打算去追逐神谕，成为英雄时…*我们*还有些后悔，后悔当时为什么要把预言讲给你听……
t_en: Honestly, when we learned you planned to pursue the prophecy and become a hero... we couldn't help but feel regret. We regretted telling you about the prophecy in the first place...

t_ch: 因为那就意味着你会离开*我们*身边，去走一条充满危险的道路。如果因此失去一位挚友…那*我们*会非常伤心的。
t_en: It meant you would leave our side and embark on a dangerous journey. If it meant losing a dear friend... we would be heartbroken.

t_ch: 不过，现在*我们*已经想通啦——你很强大，塞涅俄丝，你注定要在这个世间留下印记…*我们*相信你有改变世界的力量。
t_en: But we have come to accept it. You're strong, Seliose, and you're meant to leave your mark on the world... We believe you have the power to change the world.

t_ch: 而且，*我们*和姐妹们之所以会离开雅努萨波利斯，就是为了给翁法罗斯带去希望和奇迹。而要把奇迹带入现实，光靠*我们*的力量可远远不够呀。
t_en: The reason we left Janusopolis was to bring hope and miracles to Amphoreus. But to turn those miracles into reality, our strength alone won't be enough.

t_ch: 所以，*我们*希望你能成为英雄！希望你能让世界上的人们看到，我们应该团结起来，而不是互相争斗……
t_en: We hope you will become a hero and show the world that unity, not division, is what we need...

t_ch: 当然，一切的前提还是你能保证自己的安好！我相信，以你的力量一定可以做到。
t_en: All of this is only possible if you stay safe! With your ability, we believe you can do it.

t_ch: ——你的好朋友，缇宋。
t_en: — Your good friend, Trissha

t_ch: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
t_en: Dear Seliose,

t_ch: 感谢你的回信！真没想到，*我们*居然是通过这种形式了解到了你的过去……
t_en: Thank you for your letter! Never expected that we would learn about your past in this way...

t_ch: 为什么你没有早些告诉我呢？如果我们早点谈到这些…也许我就能多和你聊聊，帮你解开心结啦……
t_en: Why didn't you tell us sooner? We could have helped you untangle your feelings if we had talked about this earlier...

t_ch: 啊，*我们*没有埋怨你的意思哦！*我们*甚至还有些佩服你，因为经历了那么多以后，你居然还能保持那份热情、阳光，真是厉害！
t_en: We aren't blaming you! Honestly, we even admire you. After everything you've been through, you've managed to keep that passion and positivity — it's truly impressive!

t_ch: 但…*我们*也知道，有一些伤疤是会陪伴人渡过一辈子的。它永远不会消褪，而且总会在特定的时候隐隐作痛。
t_en: But... we also know that some scars stay with you for life. They never fully fade, and they always hurt when you least expect it.

t_ch: 所以，在遇到困难的时候…如果你有什么难以启齿的话想要与人分享，就写信给*我们*吧？
t_en: When times get tough... if there's anything you can't bring yourself to say to others, just write to us.

t_ch: 你选择的道路非常艰难，没有必要把所有重担都一个人抗在肩上！要记得，如果想要团结人们、打破心跟心之间的壁障，耐心的沟通和分享是必不可少的环节！
t_en: The road you've chosen is tough, but there's no need to bear all the burdens alone! Remember, if you aim to unite people and tear down the barriers between hearts, patient communication and sharing are absolutely crucial.

t_ch: 只是高高在上地发号施令，或是习惯了替别人做决定的人…是很难感受到他人的真心的。
t_en: It's hard to truly understand others when you're always giving orders to them or making decisions for them.

t_ch: ——你的好朋友，缇宋。
t_en: — Your good friend, Trissha

t_ch: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
t_en: Dear Seliose,

t_ch: *我们*听说啦，你打算以自己的力量挑战艾格勒，终结天空一族的纷争。
t_en: Word has reached us that you intend to face Aquila alone and resolve the strife among the Sky people.

t_ch: *我们*丝毫都不怀疑，你拥有挑战泰坦的力量！但在你正式踏上征程之前，*我们*还想给你讲一个故事…希望还来得及。
t_en: We have no doubts that you are strong enough to face the Titans! But before you embark on your journey, we'd like to share a story with you... Hopefully, there's still time.

t_ch: 小的时候，在雅努萨波利斯，妈妈会教我们折纸，把一张张红色的纸片折成各种形状：小鸟，小鱼，头冠，漂亮的衣服……
t_en: As kids in Janusopolis, we spent hours with our mom learning origami. She'd take a stack of red paper and guide our hands as we turned them into birds, fish, crowns, and elaborate clothes...

t_ch: *我们*一直都以为，折纸是一件特别快乐的事。因为每次折出一件成功的作品以后，妈妈总是会看着我们，露出宠爱的笑容。
t_en: We always thought there was sheer joy in origami. Every successful fold we made brought a loving smile from Mama.

t_ch: 直到妈妈离开以后…*我们*才发现，折纸本身其实并没有多么快乐…*我们*很快就忘记了那个陪伴了*我们*半个童年的爱好。
t_en: It wasn't until after Mama left that we realized origami itself hadn't been the true source of our joy. We soon left behind the hobby that had occupied so much of our childhood.

t_ch: 那时*我们*才终于明白，原来*我们*喜欢的不是折纸这件事本身，而是妈妈对*我们*折出来的作品的反应。
t_en: We eventually understood that it wasn't the folding we loved, but Mama's reactions to our creations.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝，你在回信里说到，你爱着自己的族人，而且想要为他们打败残酷的神明……
t_en: Seliose, you wrote of your love for your people and your desire to defeat the cruel gods for them...

t_ch: 从你的字里行间透露出来的激烈情感，让*我们*有些担心…会不会你所说的对于族人的爱，与*我们*对折纸的爱有些相似呢？
t_en: Your intense emotions make us wonder... Is your love for your people similar to our love for origami?

t_ch: 请你一定要仔细想想这件事呀。如果你所爱的「人」只是抽象的概念，而非具体的「人」…那样的话，即便在拯救了他们以后…你能获得的或许也只是失望。
t_en: Please take a moment to consider this. If your love for "humans" is merely an abstract notion rather than love for specific individuals, you may end up disappointed even after saving them.

t_ch: 对不起，*我们*这次说的话有些沉重啦。但作为朋友，*我们*觉得有必要对你说出这些话…那样，你才能做出对自己负责的选择呀。
t_en: We are sorry if our words come across as heavy. However, as your friend, we feel it's important to voice these concerns. That way, you can make choices that are genuinely accountable to yourself.

t_ch: ——你的好朋友，缇宋。
t_en: — Your good friend, Trissha

t_ch: 不行呀…祷言的效力不够持久，没法让风场一直倒转。
t_en: It didn't work... The prayer's power didn't last long enough, and we couldn't get the fans to keep turning in the other direction.

t_ch: 没准那台装置能帮到我们？有必要的话就去瞧瞧吧。
t_en: Hmm, maybe that device can help? Go check it out if you need to.

t_ch: 来比立定跳远吧？
t_en: Let's have a long jump competition.

t_ch: 风堇，搭个桥。
t_en: Hyacine, give us a bridge.

t_ch: 别着急走，搭档——先把这里的事处理完吧。
t_en: Don't go just yet, partner — let's wrap up what needs to be done here first.

t_ch: 啊，这台装置…好像能增强欧洛尼斯祷言的效力！
t_en: Ah! It looks like... this device can amplify the power of Oronyx's Prayer!

t_ch: 试着用它的力量扭转风场的方向吧，搭档？
t_en: Why don't you try to change the wind's direction with this thing, partner?

t_ch: 过程很顺利，还剩一处「电路」需要修复……
t_en: Smooth sailing so far. We've got one more "circuit" to fix...

t_ch: 继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
t_en: Let's keep going and find the tablet on the other side.

t_ch: 过程很顺利，还剩一处「电路」需要修复……
t_en: Smooth sailing so far. We've got one more "circuit" to fix...

t_ch: 继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
t_en: Let's keep going and find the tablet on the other side.

t_ch: 这道大门…应该是圣堂的出口？
t_en: Is this door... the exit to the hall?

t_ch: 把必要的事做完以后再回来吧。
t_en: Let's come back after we've done everything we need to do.

t_ch: 这里，一片寂静……
t_en: It's so quiet here...

t_ch: 岁月流逝，恐怕晨昏之眼早已变成一片废墟。
t_en: It's been so long... Maybe the Eye of Twilight has already turned into ruins.

t_ch: 嗯…这样应该就对啦？
t_en: Hmm... I think this should be right?

t_ch: 静下心来，寻找出路……
t_en: Deep breaths, and find the way out...

t_ch: 传说中，英雄塞涅俄丝身边有两只翼兽伙伴。
t_en: Legend has it that the hero Seliose was always flanked by two winged companions.

t_ch: 索拉比斯和露奈比斯，它们是她的坐骑、战友。
t_en: Solabis and Lunabis. They were her steeds and comrades.

t_ch: 假如它们还未逝去，或许能帮助我们对抗艾格勒。
t_en: If they are still alive, they might help us confront Aquila.

t_ch: 露奈比斯阁下！是你吗？你听得到吗？
t_en: Lady Lunabis! Is that you? Can you hear me?

t_ch: 我是英雄塞涅俄丝的后代…我们是来完成她的使命的！
t_en: I am the descendant of the hero Seliose... We have come to complete her mission!

t_ch: 那是…又一只？
t_en: That's... another one?

t_ch: 索拉比斯阁下，请挣脱黑潮的掌控……
t_en: Lord Solabis, please break free from the control of the black tide...

t_ch: …回到清醒的世界吧！
t_en: ...And return to your senses!

t_ch: 露奈比斯阁下不和我们一起吗？
t_en: Is Lady Lunabis not going with us?

t_ch: 我会在下一站等着你们，小风堇。
t_en: I will be waiting for you all at the next destination, Hyacine.

t_ch: 索拉比斯阁下…为何在你苏醒前，露奈比斯阁下一直沉默不语？
t_en: Lord Solabis... Why did Lady Lunabis remain silent until you woke up?

t_ch: 晨昏与阴晴，本是一体两面。
t_en: Brilliant dawn and shadowed dusk are but two sides of the same coin.

t_ch: 只有二者同时醒来，我们的灵智才算完整。
t_en: Our consciousness will only become whole when both are awake at the same time.

t_ch: 这样就可以了吧。
t_en: This should probably do it.

t_ch: 巨型电路已经接通了，回去检查一遍浑象仪吧。
t_en: The giant circuit has been powered up. Let's go back and check the celestial globe.

t_ch: 艾格勒逃向了堡垒的另一端…追上它吧。
t_en: Aquila has fled to the other end of the fortress... Let's chase after them.

t_ch: 露奈比斯会为你们指引方向。
t_en: Lunabis will lead the way.

t_ch: 这些壁画…好像不止在刻画天空泰坦。
t_en: These murals... seem to depict more than just the Sky Titan.

t_ch: 要稍微停下来看看吗？
t_en: Shall we stop for a look?

t_ch: 这边，英雄们。
t_en: Here, heroes.

t_ch: 解开「西风罗盘」…来雨之民的殿堂和我汇合吧。
t_en: Solve the West Wind Compass... and come meet me in the hall of the Rainfolk.

t_ch: 风堇姑娘…方才，你如何确信自己能让索拉比斯挣脱痛苦？
t_en: Miss Hyacine... How were you so certain that you could free Solabis from suffering?

t_ch: 抱歉，我并无万全把握，露奈比斯阁下……
t_en: My apologies, Lady Lunabis. I was not all that certain.

t_ch: 但如果身为医者的我都失去了乐观，病患们又如何能燃起生的希望呢？
t_en: But if even the healer loses hope, then how will the patients repossess their hope for life?

t_ch: …真是温柔的回答啊。
t_en: ...What a kind answer.

t_ch: 这里的眷属，似乎都被黑潮侵蚀了。
t_en: The Titankin here appear to have all been corrupted by the black tide.

t_ch: 据说黑潮是来自天外的灾厄，若真是如此…天空的防线自然是最先受到冲击的。
t_en: It's said the black tide is a calamity from beyond the sky. If that's true... the sky's defenses would naturally be the first to be breached.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝挑战神明以后，天空之子们去了哪里？
t_en: Where did the Skyfolk go after Seliose challenged the god?

t_ch: 和历史上的所有部族一样，被淹没在了时代的乌云中。
t_en: Just like the countless tribes throughout history, they were drowned in the dark clouds of time.

t_ch: 有反应了，看来我的猜测没错。
t_en: It's reacting. Looks like my guess was right.

t_ch: 不愧是你，灰宝操作扎格列斯之手的样子也越来越熟练啦。
t_en: As expected, Grayie is getting more and more skilled at handling the Hand of Zagreus.

t_ch: 走吧，我们回去检查下浑象仪。
t_en: Let's go. We should return and check on the celestial globe.

t_ch: 像塞涅俄丝那样强大的英雄…与她结合并传承血脉的另一半，传说中却完全没有记录。
t_en: Seliose is such a mighty hero... Yet her partner, who must have walked with her to pass on her bloodline, was completely unrecorded in legend.

t_ch: 他也是一位战士吗？又或者……
t_en: Was he also a warrior? Or perhaps...

t_ch: …你很快就能得到答案了，风堇姑娘。
t_en: You will soon have your answer, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 索拉比斯阁下在等着我们。
t_en: Lord Solabis is waiting for us.

t_ch: 弑神的猎手，能从猎物的声音判断其状态。
t_en: A god-slayer can tell the state of their prey by its sounds.

t_ch: 神的部分？怨愤，惶悚。
t_en: The god's part? I sense resentment. Terror.

t_ch: 她的部分…我无法感知。
t_en: But as for her... I cannot sense anything.

t_ch: 艾格勒…它仿佛已经知晓自己的命运。
t_en: Aquila... already seems aware of their fate.

t_ch: 我们不会让它等太久，就用泰坦之血为「侵晨」开锋吧。
t_en: We won't make them wait for too long. A Titan shall get Dawnmaker to have its first taste of blood.

t_ch: 你手中那把长剑…我似乎在何处见过。
t_en: That sword you wield... it seems familiar.

t_ch: 是你的记忆出了偏差么？这把剑不久前才被铸成。
t_en: Are you sure about that? This was only recently forged.

t_ch: …或许吧。
t_en: ...Perhaps.

t_ch: 「侵晨」在我手中越发轻盈……
t_en: Dawnmaker feels lighter and lighter in my hands...

t_ch: 我感觉，自己不止能用剑锋斩除罪恶——
t_en: I feel that I can do more than just cut down evil with this blade —

t_ch: ——还能以金焰创造黎明！
t_en: — With golden flames, I can forge a new dawn!

t_ch: 浑象仪就在前方——去逼出艾格勒吧。
t_en: The celestial globe is right ahead. Let's go and force Aquila to come out.

t_ch: 那些「电路」似乎都被黑潮侵染了……
t_en: These "circuits" all seem to be corroded by the black tide...

t_ch: 但愿那两台<color=#dbc291ff>预言算碑能帮我们解决问题。</color>
t_en: Here's hoping those two <color=#dbc291ff>Prophecy Tablets can help us out.</color>

t_ch: 这样一来，祷言应该就能持久回溯啦——
t_en: Now the prayer should rewind for even longer —

t_ch: 试着用它操控风场吧，搭档？
t_en: Let's try to control the wind's direction with this thing, partner!

t_ch: 算碑就在眼前了。
t_en: The tablet is right ahead.

t_ch: 总算…但愿这能修好浑象仪。
t_en: We've finally made it... Hopefully this is enough to fix the celestial globe.

t_ch: 扎格列斯之手或许能帮我们把「硬盘」复位——
t_en: Maybe the Hand of Zagreus can help us to put the "hard drive" back to where it's meant to be...

t_ch: 你是这方面的高手，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: You're an expert at that, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这样就算完成了吗？还真是…简单粗暴呀。
t_en: This is it? That's certainly... pretty crude and simple.

t_ch: 去找下一处吧？
t_en: Should we go look for the next one?

t_ch: 灰宝，原来打算靠这种方式打败艾格勒吗？
t_en: Wait! Is this how you plan to beat Aquila?

t_ch: 想法不错——可惜现实太过残酷。
t_en: Not a bad idea — pity it doesn't work.

t_ch: 一切顺利。继续前进吧，大家。
t_en: All good. Let's keep going.

t_ch: 天空…在燃烧。
t_en: The sky is burning.

t_ch: 奥赫玛的黎明…落幕了……
t_en: Okhema's Dawn has come to an end...

t_ch: 究竟是为什么…？
t_en: Why is this happening...?

t_ch: 风堇能修复天空吗…
t_en: Can Hyacine fix the sky...

t_ch: 不…恐怕太晚了。这片天空已经彻底被黑潮吞没……
t_en: No... it's too late. This sky has been completely swallowed by the black tide...

t_ch: 这片黑暗…它的力量恐怕凌驾于泰坦的权能之上。
t_en: This darkness... Its power probably surpasses that of the Titans.

t_ch: 神谕里没写这个？
t_en: Was this not predicted in the prophecy?

t_ch: 假如真有类似的记载…缇宝老师不可能只字未提。
t_en: Tribbie would have made sure to warn us if there were any mention of it.

t_ch: 即便风堇接过了天空的神权，她恐怕也无法驱散这片黑暗……
t_en: Even if Hyacine takes the divine authority of the sky, she probably won't be able to banish this darkness...

t_ch: 黑潮…它的力量恐怕凌驾于泰坦的权能之上。
t_en: The black tide... its power probably surpasses even that of the Titans.

t_ch: 只能寄希望于她能庇佑更多人的生命……
t_en: All we can do is hope she can protect as many lives as possible...

t_ch: 这…就是奥赫玛的末日吗……
t_en: Is this... the end for Okhema...?

t_ch: 别放弃，我们是领路的人…绝不能自己先丧失方向。
t_en: Don't give up. We're the ones leading this journey... so we can't afford to lose our way.

t_ch: 意外才是我们旅途中的常量，无论如何，我们会陪奥赫玛走到最后关头。
t_en: The unexpected is always part of our journey. We'll stay with Okhema until the end, no matter what.

t_ch: 那边——你们看到了么？那些破损的结构，似乎变成了虚浮的材质……
t_en: Over there — do you see it? The broken structures look like they've turned transparent...

t_ch: 从没见过这种现象…那也是黑潮导致的么？太多的事都欠缺解释…偏偏我们没时间停下来细究。
t_en: I've never seen anything like this before... Could the black tide be the cause? There are too many things we don't understand... and we don't have time to figure out.

t_ch: 不能再耽搁了…我们下山。但愿刻法勒的火种还安然无恙——
t_en: We can't delay any longer... Let's head down. Hopefully, Kephale's Coreflame is still safe...

t_ch: 赛飞儿小姐，我相信她会尽到自己的职责。
t_en: I'm confident that Miss Cipher will do everything in her power to fulfill her duty.

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝…谢谢。
t_en: Hyacinthia... thank you.

t_ch: 看那儿！刻法勒的火种就被保存在议会的中央。
t_en: Over there! Kephale's Coreflame is being kept in the center of the Council.

t_ch: 必须把它取走，带回创世涡心。
t_en: We must retrieve it and bring it back to the Vortex of Genesis.

t_ch: 你的意思是……
t_en: You mean...

t_ch: 对。最坏的打算…我们必须时刻准备好归还刻法勒的火种。
t_en: Right. Worst case scenario... We need to be prepared to return Kephale's Coreflame at any moment.

t_ch: 假如末日真的迫在眉睫，我们就没时间再探究「奇迹」的真相了——相信那刻夏老师的假说是唯一的选择。
t_en: If the end is indeed upon us, we no longer have time to investigate the truth behind the miracle — we'll have to trust that Professor Anaxa's hypothesis is the only option.

t_ch: 抱歉，阿格莱雅…我答应过你，要把「再创世」的选择留给翁法罗斯的人们……
t_en: Apologies, Aglaea... I promised you that I would leave the choice of Era Nova to the people of Amphoreus...

t_ch: 但如今恐怕没有踌躇的余地。
t_en: But I'm afraid there's no room for doubts now.

t_ch: 天父刻法勒，原谅那些无知又卑微的人子吧……
t_en: O Sky Father Kephale, please forgive these ignorant and lowly children of humanity...

t_ch: 他们多么地天真，竟把流着金色血液的异端们当成了救世主……
t_en: They are so utterly naive that they think of the golden-blooded heretics as Deliverers...

t_ch: 这猩红的天空，还有遍地的烈焰和魔鬼，会洗涤他们的愚蠢……
t_en: This bloodred sky, and the raging flames and demons throughout the land, will purge their foolishness...

t_ch: 凯妮斯……
t_en: Caenis...

t_ch: 啊…「救世主」阁下？
t_en: Ah... Lord "Deliverer"?

t_ch: 你不加入我，与我一起向仁慈的刻法勒祈祷吗…？
t_en: Why don't you join me in praying to the benevolent Kephale...?

t_ch: 放眼看看这片狼藉的大地吧…这一切，都是你等不敬神明的异端犯下的罪孽……
t_en: Cast your eyes on this ravaged land... All of this, sins committed by you blasphemous heretics...

t_ch: 她…已经精神不太正常了。
t_en: She... looks like she's got a screw loose.

t_ch: 嗯…我们不该在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
t_en: Mm... We should not waste our time on a pitiful madwoman.

t_ch: 为阿格莱雅报仇吧。
t_en: Time to avenge Aglaea.

t_ch: 我们还有更重要的事…不该在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
t_en: We have more important matters to attend to... We shouldn't waste our time on a pitiful madwoman.

t_ch: 你真是倒反天罡！
t_en: You are turning everything upside down!

t_ch: …别争辩了，无需在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
t_en: ...No need to argue. We're just wasting our time on a pitiful madwoman.
